hero.subtitle: A Very interested software developer in game development.

about.title: About me
about.p1: Hi! My name is Sebastian Moreno Acero, I'm from Colombia and I work as a software developer.
about.p2: I have {years} years of experience in web development, during which I have gained expertise in creating Web API using .Net Core and Node.js. I have worked on developing web applications, static websites, and mobile applications.
about.p3: My experience also includes knowledge of cloud infrastructure, particularly with Azure. Additionally, I am familiar with Linux commands and have experience with Docker.
about.p4: I'm currently very interested in development of video games.

projects.gum-fall: In Gum Fall, you'll guide a charismatic character as they jump and roll through constantly moving platforms. Make sure to dodge obstacles, collect power-ups, and beat your own high scores. With intuitive controls and progressively challenging levels, each stage offers a unique and exciting experience.
projects.jeseb-hub: Jeseb Hub is a personal finance platform where you can manage your transactions (income and expenses) with precision, separate them into different accounts (bank accounts, cash, etc.), categorize them according to your needs (savings, salary, car, food, debts, expenses, investments, etc.), and view a detailed report comparing your income and expenses with the previous month. Features: Precise Control, Separate Accounts, Advanced Categorization, Detailed Report, Overall Balance, Balance Evolution, Monthly Top Expenses.

works.library: Simple WPF project with C#, library where you can keep track of books, clients and loans.
works.sysma-notes: Simple Web API project with login, registration with email confirmation, profile update, note creation, editing and deletion.
works.template-webpack: Simple template to use React with multiple page for servers only static files.
works.pong: Pong is a table tennis–themed twitch arcade sports video game, featuring simple two-dimensional graphics, manufactured by Atari and originally released in 1972.
works.pacman: PacMan is an arcade video game created by video game designer Toru Iwatani of the Namco company, and distributed by Midway Games to the American market in the early 1980s.

gumFall.p1: Gum Fall is a game where you move between platforms and avoid traps.
gumFall.p2: Get ready for heart-pounding action with Gum Fall! This thrilling arcade game is a revamped version of the classic Rapid Roll, now featuring stunning graphics and addictive gameplay that will keep you glued to the screen.
gumFall.p3: In Gum Fall, you'll guide a charismatic character as they jump and roll through constantly moving platforms. Make sure to dodge obstacles, collect power-ups, and beat your own high scores. With intuitive controls and progressively challenging levels, each stage offers a unique and exciting experience.
gumFall.f1: Colorful and revamped graphics that will captivate your senses.
gumFall.f2: Fast-paced and dynamic gameplay that keeps you on your toes.
gumFall.f3: Simple and easy-to-use controls for players of all ages.
gumFall.f4: Global leaderboards to compete with friends and players around the world.
gumFall.cta: Download Gum Fall now and discover why everyone is talking about this new arcade classic. Join the fun and show off your skills!
